description: Navigate to alternativeto.net alternatives for Photoshop

alternatives.name: GIMP
alternatives.description: Free open-source suite offering advanced photo retouching, image composition, original artwork creation, batch processing, plugin support, custom scripting, mass image format conversion, and integrati
alternatives.platforms: Mac, Windows, Linux, BSD, Snapcraft, Flathub

alternatives.name: Krita
alternatives.description: Free, open-source painting software designed by artists for artists. Offers customizable UI, 9 brush engines, color management, tablet support, non-destructive editing, and privacy features. Portable
alternatives.platforms: Mac, Windows, Linux, Android Tablet, KDE Plasma, Epic Games Store

alternatives.name: Paint.NET
alternatives.description:
Free Windows image editor with support for layers, plugins, and special effects. Offers intuitive interface, works offline, ad-free, and portable, consuming fewer resources.

165 Paint.NET alternative

alternatives.name: Photopea
alternatives.description: Browser-based image editing supports PSD, XCF, Sketch formats, advanced layers, vector tools, RAW photo support, and exports in 40+ formats. Fully client-side with AI background removal, content-aware

alternatives.name: Pixlr
alternatives.description: Web-based editor with AI image generation, quick fixes, overlays, intricate lighting and texture adjustments, customizable templates, advanced filters, support for layers, high-res export, and ad-free
alternatives.platforms: Windows, Online, Android, iPhone, Chrome OS, Android Tablet
